allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([x for x in v if x.startswith\('5'\)][-3:]\)")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object Used,Free | ForEach-Object { '\\''Used: '\\'' + [math]::Round\($_.Used/1GB,1\) + '\\'' GB  Free: '\\'' + [math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,1\) + '\\'' GB'\\'' }')
